title: asteraceae
intro: The asteraceae rank is a family of flowering plants that includes over 23,000 species, commonly known as daisies, sunflowers, and asters. This family is characterized by the presence of composite flowers, which are made up of multiple small flowers clustered together to form a larger flower head. The asteraceae family is one of the largest and most diverse plant families, with species found in a wide range of habitats all over the world. Many members of the asteraceae family are popular garden flowers, while others are valued for their edible seeds, such as sunflower seeds, or their medicinal properties.
